# Bora Pesa — AI-readable documentation index

## Project

Bora Pesa is a unified, open-source TypeScript payments SDK for Tanzania. Single factory function (`createPesa()`), provider adapters, plugin system, event store, framework adapters. MIT licensed. Inspired by better-auth.

- Repository: https://github.com/borapesa/pesa
- Package: `@borapesa/pesa` (core) + `@borapesa/*` adapters
- Website: https://borapesa.dev

## Core documentation

- [README.md](README.md) — project overview, design principles, quick start
- [AI_USAGE_POLICY.md](AI_USAGE_POLICY.md) — AI assistance disclosure policy for contributors
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) — project map and architecture (for AI agents)
- [borapesa-technical-spec-v1.md](../borapesa-technical-spec-v1.md) — full technical specification v1.0

## Packages

### @borapesa/pesa (core)
- [README.md](packages/pesa/README.md) — install, quick start, exports
- [src/pesa.ts](packages/pesa/src/pesa.ts) — `createPesa()` factory + `PesaInstance` interface
- [src/handler.ts](packages/pesa/src/handler.ts) — generic HTTP mount handler
- [src/providers/base.ts](packages/pesa/src/providers/base.ts) — `BasePaymentProvider` abstract class
- [src/plugins/retry.ts](packages/pesa/src/plugins/retry.ts) — retry plugin (exponential/linear/fixed backoff)
- [src/plugins/idempotency.ts](packages/pesa/src/plugins/idempotency.ts) — idempotency plugin
- [src/plugins/logging.ts](packages/pesa/src/plugins/logging.ts) — logging plugin with PII redaction
- [src/plugins/webhook-verify.ts](packages/pesa/src/plugins/webhook-verify.ts) — webhook secret enforcement
- [src/db/sqlite.ts](packages/pesa/src/db/sqlite.ts) — SQLite event store adapter (default)
- [src/testing/bogus.ts](packages/pesa/src/testing/bogus.ts) — `BogusPaymentProvider` (test double)
- [src/errors.ts](packages/pesa/src/errors.ts) — error hierarchy
- [src/validate.ts](packages/pesa/src/validate.ts) — input validation
- [src/types/](packages/pesa/src/types/) — all type definitions

### @borapesa/clickpesa
- [README.md](providers/clickpesa/README.md) — install, supported operations, credentials
- [src/clickpesa.ts](providers/clickpesa/src/clickpesa.ts) — `ClickPesaProvider` implementation

## Guides

- **Getting started:** See `README.md` at the repo root
- **Building a provider adapter:** Extend `BasePaymentProvider` (4 required methods: `createOrder`, `getPaymentStatus`, `handleWebhook`, `disburse`)
- **Adding a framework adapter:** Wrap `pesa.mount` (`(Request) => Response`) for your framework
- **Writing plugins:** Implement `PesaPlugin` with `beforeRequest`, `afterResponse`, `onPaymentEvent`, or `init` hooks

## Configuration

- `pnpm format` — format all files with Biome
- `pnpm test` — run all tests
- `pnpm coverage` — run tests with coverage
- `pnpm typecheck` — TypeScript type check
- `pnpm build` — compile all packages
